name: Coding Interview Synthesis — Full Mock Rounds

hook.what_you_will_build: Coding Interview Synthesis — Full Mock Rounds

key_takeaways: Full mock round: 45 min, one medium + optimize, communication throughout
Pattern first: always identify pattern before coding
Brute force first: always have something working before optimizing
Edge cases: null, empty, single element, all same, negative numbers
Test your code: trace through example BEFORE saying 'done'
Questions for interviewer: 3 ready — tech stack, team culture, day-to-day
reflection.next_topic_preview: Module 42 complete! Next: M43 System Design Basics.
